heading: Use Cases
body:
MongoDB Vector Search supports the following vector search use cases:

- **Semantic Search**: Query your vector embeddings based on semantic similarity
  by using the ANN (Approximate Nearest Neighbor) or ENN (Exact Nearest Neighbor) search algorithm.

  To learn more, see [How to Perform Semantic Search Against Data in Your Atlas Cluster](vector-search-tutorial) and [Run Vector Search Queries](return-vector-search-results).

- **Hybrid Search**: Combine results from multiple
  search queries, including vector search and full-text search.
  To learn more, see [How to Perform Hybrid Search](as_hybrid-search).

- **Generative Search**: Use MongoDB Vector Search to retrieve relevant
  data for your generative AI applications by implementing
  **retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)**.

  To learn how to implement RAG, see [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](avs-rag).
  To learn how to build AI agents with vector search, including implementing
  agentic RAG, see [Build AI Agents with MongoDB](ai-agents).
